sources.title: Shadows Side | 2025 Full Movie | Horror Movie Full Movie
sources.description:
Shadows Side | 2025 Full Movie | Horror Movie Full Movie | Best Horror Movies | 2025 Horror Movie | New Horror Movies On YouTube | Free Horror Movies

Shadows Side is a psychological thriller that delves into the harrowing journey of Sophie, a young woman who, while seeking a romantic retreat in an isolated chalet, finds herself trapped in a supernatural nightmare. The discovery of an ancestral pact, involving her fiancé Cal, triggers a series of inexplicable events, leaving her at the mercy of dark forces. Confined to the chalet, Sophie faces horrifying apparitions, macabre riddles and a terrifying creature, forcing her to uncover the hidden secrets that haunt the place. As Sophie fights for her sanity, she discovers that an ancient mandala is her only hope for survival.

2025.  Stars: Fábio Campos, Magna Fontes, Alice Oliveira
